ddls:
CREATE TABLE "buildings" (
  "building_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building */,
  "overall_condition" INTEGER /* Overall condition of the building (0-5) */,
  "age_yrs" INTEGER /* Age of the building in years */,
  "number_of_stories" INTEGER /* Number of stories in the building */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the building */,
  "construction_date" TEXT /* Date when the building was constructed */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "inspection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of inspections (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Latitude of the building's location */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Longitude of the building's location */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building owner */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather event */,
  "max_mph" INTEGER /* Maximum wind speed in miles per hour */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Direction of the wind (e.g., N, S, E, W) */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather event */,
  "temperature" TEXT /* Temperature during the weather event */,
  "humidity" INTEGER /* Humidity during the weather event */,
  "precipitation" TEXT /* Amount of precipitation during the weather event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the weather data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roof_shapes" (
  "roof_shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roof shape */,
  "roof_shape_name" TEXT /* Name of the roof shape (e.g., Gable, Hip, Complex) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the roof shape */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roof_shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roof_covers" (
  "roof_cover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each roof cover */,
  "roof_cover_name" TEXT /* Name of the roof cover (e.g., Tile, Asphalt) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the roof cover */,
  "lifespan_years" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the roof cover in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("roof_cover_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "wall_claddings" (
  "wall_cladding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each wall cladding */,
  "wall_cladding_name" TEXT /* Name of the wall cladding (e.g., Stucco, Wood) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the wall cladding */,
  "lifespan_years" INTEGER /* Expected lifespan of the wall cladding in years */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("wall_cladding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "structural_framing_systems" (
  "structural_framing_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each structural framing system */,
  "structural_framing_system_name" TEXT /* Name of the structural framing system (e.g., Wood-frame, Steel-frame) */,
  "material" TEXT /* Material of the structural framing system */,
  "strength_rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the structural strength (e.g., 1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("structural_framing_system_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_roof_shapes" (
  "building_roof_shape_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building-roof shape relationship */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "roof_shape_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roof shape */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the roof shape was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_roof_shape_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_roof_shapes_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_roof_shapes_roof_shape_id FOREIGN KEY ("roof_shape_id") REFERENCES roof_shapes ("roof_shape_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_roof_covers" (
  "building_roof_cover_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building-roof cover relationship */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "roof_cover_id" INTEGER /* ID of the roof cover */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the roof cover was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_roof_cover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_roof_covers_roof_cover_id FOREIGN KEY ("roof_cover_id") REFERENCES roof_covers ("roof_cover_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_roof_covers_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_wall_claddings" (
  "building_wall_cladding_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building-wall cladding relationship */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "wall_cladding_id" INTEGER /* ID of the wall cladding */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the wall cladding was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_wall_cladding_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_wall_claddings_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_wall_claddings_wall_cladding_id FOREIGN KEY ("wall_cladding_id") REFERENCES wall_claddings ("wall_cladding_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_structural_framing_systems" (
  "building_structural_framing_system_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building-structural framing system relationship */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "structural_framing_system_id" INTEGER /* ID of the structural framing system */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the structural framing system was installed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_structural_framing_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_structural_framing_systems_structural_framing_system_id FOREIGN KEY ("structural_framing_system_id") REFERENCES structural_framing_systems ("structural_framing_system_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_structural_framing_systems_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., architect, engineer, contractor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the building */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the building was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_impacts" (
  "weather_impact_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather impact event */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building affected by the weather */,
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* ID of the weather event */,
  "impact_date" TEXT /* Date when the weather impact occurred */,
  "impact_type" TEXT /* Type of impact (e.g., damage, destruction) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the impact */,
  "estimated_cost" TEXT /* Estimated cost of the impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_impact_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_impacts_weather_id FOREIGN KEY ("weather_id") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_weather_impacts_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "building_conditions" (
  "building_condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each building condition event */,
  "building_id" INTEGER /* ID of the building */,
  "condition_date" TEXT /* Date when the building condition was recorded */,
  "condition_type" TEXT /* Type of condition (e.g., normal, damaged) */,
  "inspection_notes" TEXT /* Detailed notes from the inspection */,
  "inspector_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inspector who conducted the inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("building_condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_conditions_building_id FOREIGN KEY ("building_id") REFERENCES buildings ("building_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_building_conditions_inspector_id FOREIGN KEY ("inspector_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
